summary: Three agents converged on a content-agnostic MessageBus (composed PeerTransport + Local/RemoteSubscriber + sibling EventReplicator/ChatReplicator + EventStore as privileged synchronous subscriber), executed as 9 revertable phases (P0 harness/invariants first, wire-frame unification last). Devil's advocate challenged the cost/benefit: ~5-10x more permanent machinery than the ~40 lines of shared transport it removes; recommends a ~1-day cheap version (extract PeerTransport + collapse wiring chain + rename to Replicators + backfill missing tests) and hard-cutting Phase 7. Decision escalated to owner.
